note: Two structured mirrors agree the correct option is 'Водій автомобіля.' (pomahach marks it list-group-item-success/green; turbo-drive.od.ua sets data-correct=1 on it, empty data-correct on 'Водій трамвая.'). Image (516x387, Center Promin) shows a standard tram-track crossing with warning sign 1.6 'Перетинання з трамвайною лінією' and NO depot, so per ПДР 17.3 the tram has priority and the car driver must yield = our option 1. Our stored answer 2 ('Водій трамвая.') is the depot-exit case, which this image is not.
